channel.title: Job Change on Podbharati
channel.description: Recent content in Job Change on Podbharati

item.title: लोकनीति में शिक्षा और करियर विकल्पः प्रणय कोटस्थने से बातचीत | Career options in Public Policy
item.description: Looking for a #jobchange, but unsure whether this is the opportune time? Fret not! Anurag Kale shares his simple 3Q framework to help you make an informed decision about the move. What is Public Policy, and what kind of learning and career opportunities does it provide? Pranay Kotasthane, Deputy Director at The Takshashila Institution, demystifies it for you. Plus, funny anecdotes of some talented entrepreneurs and innovators, who have also been, dare we say, bit #eccentric.
